programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 11s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 16.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 9s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a sub-meter swell and a crosswind, it'll be more like Super-tubes of toothpaste today.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 14.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 9s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 9s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze and a barely-there 0.8m swell, you'll be fighting to get back to the beach more than riding.
🌊 Swell: 0.8m @ 9s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 16.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
